name: UPI Chem - PHYTOSTEROL 95 MIN
description: UPI Chem supplies high-purity PHYTOSTEROL 95 MIN (95% minimum purity) for barrier repair and anti-inflammatory applications. Plant-derived sterols provide exceptional quality and efficacy in cosmetic formulations. Phytosterols mimic cholesterol's barrier-supporting function while offering anti-inflammatory and moisturizing benefits.

certifications.description: UPI Chem is a high-purity chemicals supplier offering PHYTOSTEROL 95 MIN with 95% minimum purity. Their plant-derived sterols provide exceptional quality and efficacy as cholesterol alternatives for barrier repair, anti-inflammatory, and moisturizing applications in cosmetic formulations.
certifications.notes: CAS 83-46-5. High-purity compound (95% minimum) ensures efficacy. Plant-derived sterols provide exceptional quality in cosmetic formulations. Anti-inflammatory and moisturizing properties complement barrier repair function. Cholesterol alternative for vegan and plant-based formulations.
